column1: Thanks for testing! This is a quick end-to-end run of the core experience, from first login through to the manager dashboard.

column2: The AI Learning Coach at https://learning-agent-pearl.vercel.app — our internal app that coaches employees on using AI in their own tools.
~15 minutes. Do the steps in order; later steps depend on earlier ones (e.g. logout/re-login checks that your progress stuck).
Everyone runs steps 1-18. If you're a manager, also do steps 19-20. Use your real Housecall Pro email.
For each row: do the Action, compare to the Expected Result, then fill the last 3 columns.
Mark Pass (worked as expected), Fail (wrong/broken), or Blocked (couldn't get to this step).
Only if Fail/Blocked. High = blocks me or looks broken/embarrassing. Med = works but wrong/confusing. Low = cosmetic/nitpick.
Always welcome — especially what confused you, what you expected instead, and anything you loved. Screenshots help; paste links or note 'screenshot sent to Skylar'.
Don't stop — mark it Blocked/Fail, jot a note, and continue to the next step where you can.

column4: Tester Action
column5: Expected Result

column4: Open https://learning-agent-pearl.vercel.app in a fresh browser.
column5: 'Welcome to AI Learning Coach' screen loads with an email field; no errors.

column4: Enter your Housecall Pro email (name@housecallpro.com) and continue.
column5: You are let in; your identity is recognized on the next screens.

column4: Enter your name, then select your role/team (use 'Something else not listed here' if needed).
column5: Inputs save and the app says it will tailor your path to your team.

column4: Set your Primary AI tool (e.g. Gemini / ChatGPT / Copilot).
column5: Tool is saved as your primary tool.

column4: Choose a first goal/topic to learn.
column5: Goal is accepted and you are routed into the app.

column4: Open Calibrate (Your Progress > Calibrate) and answer the skill calibration questions to completion.
column5: You reach a 'Calibrated' result and skill levels update.

column4: Go to Home.
column5: Personalized greeting + your tier/level badge appear; page loads cleanly.

column4: Click the 'Today's Pick' card.
column5: A relevant lesson/activity opens matching your role/goals.

column4: Open Discovery (Learn > Discovery) and open a use case relevant to your role.
column5: Use cases load; the one you open is relevant with no broken content.

column4: Open Library (Learn > Library), expand a category, and open a use case.
column5: Categories expand/collapse; use case content loads correctly.

column4: Generate a lesson from a SPECIFIC topic (e.g. 'Writing customer follow-up emails with AI').
column5: A coherent, on-topic lesson generates with no clarify prompt and no placeholder text.

column4: Generate a lesson from a VAGUE topic (e.g. 'AI').
column5: App asks a clarifying question instead of generating something generic.

column4: In a narrated lesson, press Play and advance one slide.
column5: Narration plays clearly, stays in sync, and transitions without overlapping audio.

column4: Leave a lesson midway, then reopen it via the paused-lessons bell.
column5: Lesson is saved as paused and resumes at (or near) where you left off.

column4: Finish a lesson including its quiz/activity.
column5: Quiz works, completion state shows, and an XP toast/popup appears.

column4: Open Games (Learn > Games), play a full round of any game.
column5: Start screen + how-to present; game is playable end-to-end; XP awarded at the end.

column4: In a lesson, click the 'open tool' link for your preferred tool.
column5: Your preferred AI tool opens in a new tab with guidance to use it.

column4: Log out, then log back in with the same email.
column5: Profile, XP, and progress are intact — not reset and no fresh welcome bonus re-granted.

column4: As a manager, open Team Dashboard (Manager > Team Dashboard).
column5: Dashboard loads with your team's activity/metrics; values look reasonable (no NaN/blank).

column4: Open Reporting (Manager > Reporting).
column5: Reporting charts/tables render correctly.

column4: Note the single most confusing moment and rate intuitiveness 1-5.
column5: Subjective feedback captured for the team.
